name: SQL Server 中间件基线 (CIS Microsoft SQL Server 2019)
description: Microsoft SQL Server 2019/2022 安全基线 (Linux/Windows 通用 T-SQL)

rules.title: 禁用 SA 账户
rules.description: 默认管理员账户必须停用或改名

param: sqlcmd -Q "select is_disabled from sys.sql_logins where name='sa';" -h -1 -W

rules.title: Windows Authentication Mode (非 Mixed)
rules.description: 纯 Windows 认证更安全

param: sqlcmd -Q "DECLARE @r INT; EXEC master.dbo.xp_instance_regread 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE', 'Software\Microsoft\MSSQLServer\MSSQLServer', 'LoginMode', @r OUTPUT; SELECT @r;" -h -1 -W

fix.suggestion: 改注册表 LoginMode=1 或 sp_configure 'mixed mode' 0

rules.title: 强口令策略 CHECK_POLICY=ON
rules.description: 所有 SQL 登录都启 Windows 密码策略

param: sqlcmd -Q "select count(*) from sys.sql_logins where is_policy_checked=0;" -h -1 -W
sqlcmd -Q "select cast(value_in_use as int) from sys.configurations where name='xp_cmdshell';" -h -1 -W
sqlcmd -Q "select cast(value_in_use as int) from sys.configurations where name='Ole Automation Procedures';" -h -1 -W
sqlcmd -Q "select cast(value_in_use as int) from sys.configurations where name='clr enabled';" -h -1 -W

rules.title: 启用登录失败审计
rules.description: 默认审计登录失败事件

param: sqlcmd -Q "DECLARE @v INT; EXEC master.dbo.xp_instance_regread 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE','Software\Microsoft\MSSQLServer\MSSQLServer','AuditLevel',@v OUTPUT; SELECT @v;" -h -1 -W

fix.suggestion: 属性 → 安全性 → 登录审计 → 失败的登录
配置管理器 → 协议属性 → ForceEncryption=Yes

param: sqlcmd -Q "select count(*) from sys.databases d join sys.database_principals p on 1=1 where p.name='guest' and p.authentication_type=0 and d.name not in ('master','tempdb','msdb');" -h -1 -W
